Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 │ May 2026 │ V 1.2 1 

Variable Details 

This section of the codebook contains variable details to facilitate understanding and use of the variables. 

AGE_AT_END_REF_YR 

LABEL: Age of Beneficiary at End of Year 

DESCRIPTION: This is the beneficiary’s age, expressed in years and calculated as of the end of the calendar year, or,
